name: Lionheart Holdings
business: We are a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a Business Combination with one or more businesses or entities. We have generated no operating revenues to date, and we do not expect that we will generate operating revenues until we consummate our initial Business Combination.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial Business Combination
catalysts.sentence: We must complete our initial Business Combination by (x) June 20, 2026, the end of our Combination Period, which is 24 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering
